title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 14, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP Ariba has launched a next-gen platform for intelligent procurement, leveraging AI capabilities. This update aims to transform the source-to-pay process for businesses.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP has announced its 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners. The awards honor partners that have excelled in delivering customer value through SAP solutions.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP launches Distributed Energy Resources to unlock energy flexibility market value. It enables utilities to orchestrate data from various sources for better decision-making.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are now prioritizing customer experience across the entire lead-to-cash journey. This shift matters as it directly impacts operational efficiency and business success.
